ops.title: Swap cc-squash passes A/B onto format-core
ops.description: Tag-pinned cargo git dep on cc-context/format-core. encode_smaller → select_encoding (Prose EXCLUDED — user decision; Tab TOON pinned); pass A uses the precision-preserving compact writer (fixes today's f64 numeric corruption + BTreeMap key alphabetization); delete pipeline/toon.rs + direct toon-format dep; prop_toon.rs gains non-i64 numeric leaves; eyes-on re-bless of pipeline_equiv goldens (diffs are the numeric/key-order FIXES). Blocked by format-core task. Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 3.

ops.text: pipeline_equiv + prop suites green after reviewed re-bless
a 26+ digit decimal in a tool_result survives pass A/B byte-exact in numeric value
pipeline/toon.rs and direct toon-format dep deleted
